name: Acorns
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together butter, brown sugar, and 3/4 cup of chopped pecans until well blended.
3. Add vanilla extract and mix on low speed until combined.
4. Gradually add flour and baking powder, mixing well.
5. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Place the balls onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes.
9. Dip each cooled cookie into melted chocolate chips, ensuring it is evenly coated.
10. Transfer the dipped cookies back onto the parchment paper to set the chocolate.
11. Repeat with remaining dough balls.
12. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
Yield: 3 dozen
